parity_drift_banner: Apply drift: the gateway may not reflect the saved policy. Check /health and re-apply.
devices_empty: No policy entries - every device follows the default rules.
token_prompt: Enter the panel token (PANEL_SECRET) to make changes. It is stored only in this browser.
band_confirm: This device is pinned by the router-side FULL_PROXY_SOURCES band. A dynamic policy outranks the band on the gateway - apply the override anyway?
purge_confirm: Delete ALL collected statistics (domains included)? The policy audit is not touched.
error_generic: The request was rejected - see the message.
delete_drift_warn: The entry was removed from the store, but the gateway apply FAILED - the device policy may still be live on the gateway. Check the drift banner and re-apply.
band_confirm_unknown: Could not check the router band list. This address MIGHT be a router-pinned band member - apply the override anyway?
